name: FreelanceApplication
description: A record of an application submitted or prepared for a freelance opportunity.

platform.description: The platform where the application is submitted (e.g., Upwork, Freelancer)

client_name.description: The name of the client or hiring company

job_title.description: The title of the job applied for

status.description: Current status of the application (draft, packaged, approval_requested, approved, submitted_manually, submitted_by_connector, won, rejected, archived)

proposal_title.description: Subject or title of the proposal

proposal_body.description: The full text of the proposal or cover letter

tone.description: The tone used in the proposal (e.g., professional, enthusiastic, concise)

skill_emphasis.description: Skills highlighted in this specific application

bid_amount.description: The amount bid for the project

currency.description: Currency of the bid (e.g., USD, EUR)

estimated_timeline.description: Estimated time to complete the work

cover_questions.description: Answers to specific platform cover questions

required_documents.description: List of documents required by the platform

linked_mission_id.description: ID of the AutopilotMission for approval

linked_comms_template_id.description: ID of the CommsTemplate used for follow-ups

submission_mode.description: How the application is to be submitted (manual_review, connector_ready, not_configured)

submitted_at.description: Timestamp when the application was submitted

follow_up_due_at.description: Timestamp when a follow-up is scheduled

follow_up_status.description: Status of the follow-up process (none, queued, sent, acknowledged)

risk_level.description: Risk level associated with this application

approval_notes.description: Notes from the user or autopilot during approval
